handoffItems.description: Azure topology, tenant boundaries, capacity, and isolation contracts have been accepted.
Worker lifecycle, heartbeat, drain, lease, retry, poison, concurrency, abandonment, circuit breaker, and diagnostics contracts have been accepted.
Deployment pipeline, environment, parameter, validation, artifact, rollback, approval, and health-check contracts have been accepted.
Correlation, structured logs, metrics, health signals, alerts, dashboards, and anomaly contracts have been accepted.
Execution, resumability, replay, fault injection, throughput, audit, and large-manifest validation contracts have been accepted.
Readiness, maintenance mode, emergency stop/drain, authorization, override, and checklist governance contracts have been accepted.
